title: Traffic Advisory & Street Closure Notice for 2026 St. Patrick's Parade
summary: The City of Syracuse issued a traffic advisory for the 2026 St. Patrick's Day Parade occurring March 14, with extensive street closures downtown beginning at 8 a.m. The notice includes detailed closure maps, parking guidance, and alternate routing instructions for residents and visitors accessing downtown from all cardinal directions. This is a recurring annual event requiring coordination across transportation, parks, and public safety infrastructure.
department_refs: Department of Parks, Recreation and Youth Programs
processing_notes: Content truncated mid-sentence in source material; routing instructions from North direction incomplete
Author listed as Unknown; attributed to Parks Department based on URL and content context
No budget impact, contracts, or policy changes detailed—informational notice only
